'''vashodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaching|reaching]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaching|reaching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vashodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væshedeth|væshedeth]] || [[word:væshedej|væshedej]] || [[word:væshedesh|væshedesh]] || [[word:væshede|væshede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashoshodoth|vashoshodoth]] || [[word:vashoshodoj|vashoshodoj]] || [[word:vashoshodosh|vashoshodosh]] || [[word:vashoshodo|vashoshodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashodoth|vashodoth]] || [[word:vashodoj|vashodoj]] || [[word:vashodosh|vashodosh]] || [[word:vashodo|vashodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashofdoth|vashofdoth]] || [[word:vashofdoj|vashofdoj]] || [[word:vashofdosh|vashofdosh]] || [[word:vashofdof|vashofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vashodotho|vashodotho]] || [[word:vashodojo|vashodojo]] || [[word:vashodosho|vashodosho]] || [[word:vashodoko|vashodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vashodoth|vashodoth]] || [[word:vashodoj|vashodoj]] || [[word:vashodosh|vashodosh]] || [[word:vashodo|vashodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vashodothol|vashodothol]] || [[word:vashodojol|vashodojol]] || [[word:vashodoshol|vashodoshol]] || [[word:vashodokol|vashodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vashodothotho|vashodothotho]] || [[word:vashodojojo|vashodojojo]] || [[word:vashodoshosho|vashodoshosho]] || [[word:vashodoko|vashodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vashodothon|vashodothon]] || [[word:vashodojon|vashodojon]] || [[word:vashodoshon|vashodoshon]] || [[word:vashodokon|vashodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vashodothoro|vashodothoro]] || [[word:vashodojoro|vashodojoro]] || [[word:vashodoshoro|vashodoshoro]] || [[word:vashodokoro|vashodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
